ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Customer's given name */,
  "middle_initial" TEXT /* Customer's middle initial */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Customer's surname */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Customer's street address */,
  "city" INTEGER /* Customer's city (foreign key to cities) */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state (foreign key to states) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country (foreign key to countries) */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "telephone_number" TEXT /* Customer's telephone number */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Customer's birthday */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Customer's marital status */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of the customer's income */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Customer's highest educational qualification */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Customer's occupation */,
  "language" TEXT /* Customer's primary language */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" INTEGER /* Customer's preferred communication channel (foreign key to communication_channels) */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* How the customer was referred to the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is currently active */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "lifetime_value" TEXT /* Customer's lifetime value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_communication_channel FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_communication_channel") REFERENCES communication_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "data_protection_laws" TEXT /* Brief description of data protection laws in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the state is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the city is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "interaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Communication channel used for the interaction (foreign key to communication_channels) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the interaction record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the interaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES communication_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the segment */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the segment was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the segment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment the customer belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the mapping */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_mapping_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_mapping_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the communication channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the communication channel */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the communication channel is currently enabled */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the channel */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)
